pattern: Enumerate all numerator/denominator pairs and keep only those whose GCD equals 1.
hints: Iterate over every denominator d from 2 to n and every numerator p from 1 to d-1.
A fraction p/d is already in lowest terms when gcd(p, d) == 1.
Collect the qualifying fractions as formatted strings and return them in any order.

edge_inputs.description: n=6 includes non-simplified pairs like 2/4 and 3/6 that must be excluded
prime denominator means all numerators qualify
